description: Add comprehensive unit tests for all SuperGrok OAuth behavior: OAuth flow, token refresh, image generation with xAI, credential redaction, and routing. All tests use mocks (no live credentials).
steps: 1. Create tests/unit/supergrok-oauth.test.ts: Test the OAuth provider config (buildAuthUrl generates correct URL with PKCE params, exchangeToken calls correct endpoint with form body, mapTokens extracts fields correctly). Mock fetch for token endpoint.

2. In the same or separate test file tests/unit/supergrok-token-refresh.test.ts: Test that DefaultExecutor.refreshCredentials for xai provider with refreshToken calls auth.x.ai/oauth2/token with correct params and returns { accessToken, refreshToken, expiresIn }. Test failure case returns null.

3. Create tests/unit/supergrok-image-generation.test.ts: Test handleImageGenerationCore with provider='xai'. Verify: (a) size 1024x1024 maps to aspect_ratio 1:1, (b) size 1792x1024 maps to 16:9, (c) size 1024x1792 maps to 9:16, (d) model defaults to body.model, (e) response is normalized to OpenAI format. Mock fetch for xAI image API.

4. Create tests/unit/supergrok-import-route.test.ts: Test the /api/oauth/supergrok/import route handler. Verify: (a) missing refreshToken returns 400, (b) valid refreshToken with successful validation creates connection with provider='xai' and authType='supergrok_oauth', (c) xAI 403 response surfaces as 'OAuth connected but API access denied'. Mock fetch and localDb.
5. Verify all tests pass with npm run test. Ensure no regressions in existing tests.
acceptance_criteria: All new test files run successfully with npm run test
Tests cover: OAuth URL generation, token exchange, token refresh (success+failure), image generation size mapping, import route validation, 403 handling
Tests do not use live credentials or make real network calls
Existing tests continue to pass without modification
Each test exercises new code paths and would fail if that code were reverted
